title: guibourtia carrissoana
intro: Guibourtia carrissoana, also known as the Angola rosewood or Carrissoana tree, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Guibourtia carrissoana include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat various infections. Herbal preparations of Guibourtia carrissoana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
